title: doellingeria infirma
intro: Doellingeria infirma, also known as slender false goldenseal or low false goldenrod, is a perennial herb that belongs to the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Doellingeria infirma include reducing inflammation, fighting off parasites, and supporting overall gut health. Herbal preparations of Doellingeria infirma are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
